source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 如图所示电路中，A、B是两个完全相同的灯泡，L为自感系数很大的线圈，其直流电阻小于灯泡电阻．C是电容器，闭合开关，电路稳定时，B灯恰能正常发光，则下列说法正确的是（ ）
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: 开关闭合足够长时间后再断开，A灯灯丝不可能被烧断

choice_map.A: 开关闭合的瞬间，A，B同时发光，亮度也相同
choice_map.B: 开关闭合的瞬间，B立即亮，A逐渐变亮
choice_map.C: 开关闭合足够长时间后再断开，A灯灯丝不可能被烧断
choice_map.D: 开关闭合足够长时间后再断开，B立即熄灭，而A逐渐熄灭

extraction_notes: 选项从question字段内联文本提取
answer字段为选项字母，已按选项映射为对应文本

image_dependency: question_text starts with "如图所示电路中", explicitly referencing a diagram
the task depends on circuit topology and component placement (A、B、L、C), which are not fully specified in text alone
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows 1 linked image and registry_passed=true
multi_step: choices compare different time phases of the circuit, including "开关闭合的瞬间" and "开关闭合足够长时间后再断开"
question_text includes inductor and capacitor behavior cues (large self-inductance coil, capacitor, resistance relation), suggesting combined transient reasoning rather than single lookup
multiple options require comparing behaviors of both bulbs A and B across different states, implying at least two-step physical reasoning
verifiability: this is a multiple-choice style question with four explicit options in choices
answer_text matches one concrete option statement, making final-answer checking feasible
answer_present=true and registry_passed=true support basic answer traceability
verifiability is reduced somewhat because top-level answer_type is "set" while asset_registry_record.answer_manifest.answer_type is "choice"

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和配图资产齐全，asset registry 通过且未报告缺失问题
该题强依赖电路图，但当前已有对应图片可支撑核心语义恢复
题目为选择题且答案已给出，综合可验证性较好
存在 answer_type_inconsistency 和 image_readability_moderate 风险，但不足以削弱核心语义支撑到需要降为 low_priority
